text:
Once upon a time, there was a tiny unicorn who lived in the heart of a vast enchanted forest. Every day, she would adventure through the forest searching for shiny gems, which she thought would make splendid unicorn horns.

One glittering eve, unicorn found a glowing emerald deep in an ancient tree hollow. It was enchanted by the moonlight, and glittered with the purest green light.

She didn't want it just as a mere ornament; she wanted to cherish it forever. But she also knew she had to return it.

On her next expedition, unicorn found many treasures but none as enchanted as the emerald. Returning home under twinkling stars, she carefully cradled the gem in her horn, feeling its quiet power.

The next morning, unicorn felt an enchantment returning to the forest. Birds sang melodiously, and dewdrops glistened on the grassy blades.

She gazed at the emerald, knowing it was hers, yet feeling a pull to give it
